project_privacy_data_flows.description: User adds or edits the short description of a Wikipedia article. Depending on the wiki language, description is written either to Wikidata (via wbsetdescription API) or directly to the local wiki article. Description text, language code, and CSRF token sent to Wikidata API.

flow_steps.code: fun postDescription(currentDescription: String, editComment: String?, editTags: String?, captchaId: String?, captchaWord: String?)
flow_steps.details: User submits edited description text. Route determined by action type and target wiki.
CSRF token acquired from target wiki (Wikidata, Commons, or local wiki).

flow_steps.code: private suspend fun postDescriptionToWikidata(csrfToken: String, currentDescription: String, editComment: String?, editTags: String?): EntityPostResponse { ... return ServiceFactory.get(Constants.wikidataWikiSite).postDescriptionEdit(language = languageCode, site = pageTitle.wikiSite.dbName(), title = pageTitle.prefixedText, value = currentDescription, summary = automaticallyAddedEditSummary, token = csrfToken, tags = editTags) }
flow_steps.details: Description text, language code, site name, page title, and edit summary sent to Wikidata API (wbsetdescription).

flow_steps.code: private suspend fun postDescriptionToArticle(csrfToken: String, currentDescription: String, ...): Edit { return ServiceFactory.get(pageTitle.wikiSite).postEditSubmit(...) }
flow_steps.details: For English Wikipedia and other local-wiki descriptions, text sent via standard postEditSubmit to action=edit.

flow_steps.code: @FormUrlEncoded @POST(MW_API_PREFIX + "action=wbsetdescription&errorlang=uselang") suspend fun postDescriptionEdit(@Field("language") language: String, @Field("uselang") useLang: String, @Field("site") site: String, @Field("title") title: String, @Field("value") value: String, @Field("summary") summary: String?, @Field("token") token: String, @Field("tags") tags: String?)
flow_steps.details: Wikidata wbsetdescription endpoint: receives language code, wiki site name, page title, description value, edit summary, CSRF token.

flow_steps.code: if (action == DescriptionEditActivity.Action.ADD_CAPTION || action == DescriptionEditActivity.Action.TRANSLATE_CAPTION) { ... postLabelEdit(csrfToken, value, languageCode, editComment) }
flow_steps.details: Image captions and caption translations edited on Commons wiki via wbsetlabel API.

flow_steps.code: fun requestSuggestion() { ... ServiceFactory[wiki, LiftWingModelService.API_URL, LiftWingModelService::class.java].getDescriptionSuggestion(Service.MW_API_PREFIX + "action=query&prop=description|pageimages|pageprops|info&...", pageTitle.prefixedText, pageTitle.wikiSite.languageCode) }
flow_steps.details: Page title and language sent to external Lift Wing ML service for auto-suggestion of article descriptions.
